name: Synthetic Bank AG (Frankfurt) — fictional test entity

functions.name: Information Security
functions.description: CISO function: security controls and monitoring

systems.name: Core Banking Platform
systems.description: System of record for accounts and ledgers

systems.name: Data Warehouse
systems.description: Regulatory and risk reporting data store

systems.name: Cloud Hosting (Vendor X)
systems.description: Third-party IaaS provider hosting core workloads

controls.name: ICT Risk Management Framework Policy
controls.description: Board-approved ICT risk management framework with defined governance roles and management-body responsibility.

controls.name: ICT Incident Management Procedure
controls.description: Documented process to detect, manage, log and follow up ICT-related incidents, with root-cause analysis.

controls.name: ICT Third-Party Register & Oversight
controls.description: Maintained register of contractual arrangements with ICT third-party service providers, with risk oversight.

controls.name: ICT Asset Inventory & Classification
controls.description: Maintained inventory of ICT assets, their classification and interdependencies in the CMDB.

controls.name: Access Control & Identity Management
controls.description: Authentication, authorisation, least-privilege and privileged-access management.

controls.name: Cryptography & Data Protection
controls.description: Encryption of data in transit and at rest; cryptographic key management.

controls.name: Security Monitoring & Anomaly Detection
controls.description: Continuous monitoring, logging and detection of anomalous activities and early warning.

controls.name: ICT Response & Recovery Plans
controls.description: Response and recovery procedures for ICT disruptions, including crisis communication.

controls.name: Backup & Restoration Policy
controls.description: Backup procedures, redundancy and tested restoration with recovery objectives.

controls.name: Incident Classification Procedure
controls.description: Classifies ICT-related incidents and cyber threats against materiality thresholds.

controls.name: Vulnerability & Patch Management
controls.description: Identification, prioritisation and remediation of vulnerabilities and patches.

controls.name: ICT Change Management
controls.description: Controlled changes to ICT systems with testing and approval gates.

controls.name: ICT Internal Audit Programme
controls.description: Independent internal audit reviews of the ICT risk management framework.

controls.name: Security Awareness & Training
controls.description: ICT security awareness programme and staff training, including the management body.

controls.name: Third-Party Contractual Controls
controls.description: Key contractual provisions, service levels and termination rights for ICT services.

controls.name: Network & Infrastructure Security
controls.description: Network segmentation, perimeter and infrastructure hardening.

controls.name: Business Continuity Management
controls.description: ICT business continuity policy ensuring continuity of critical functions.

controls.name: ICT Project & Acquisition Governance
controls.description: Governance over ICT projects, development and acquisition of ICT systems.
